description: Nuxt is an open-source framework for building full-stack web applications and websites with Vue.js. The nuxt.com site hosts its documentation, blog, deployment guides, and AI-oriented access to that content.
summary: nuxt.com exposes a public MCP server at `https://nuxt.com/mcp`; no authenticated HTTP/GraphQL developer API or standalone CLI targeting nuxt.com was found in public docs.
